coachAM: Your gratitude for new opportunities and powerful networks is clearly fueling your desire to be "a lock in young with a clear" vision, yet your inability to consistently execute fundamental disciplines like sleep and training reveals a critical disconnect between aspiration and embodied reality, directly impacting your capacity to sustain the very "discipline and efficiency" you crave. The root cause is a pervasive lack of deep self-governance, allowing external demands and immediate gratification (like "loop scrolling") to consistently override the foundational physical and mental investments required for elite performance, ultimately compromising your long-term trajectory as a faith-driven leader who builds with integrity and resilience. Tonight, at 9:00 PM, power down all screens and prepare for bed, ensuring you are physically in bed by 9:30 PM, no exceptions.
